STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL // PROJECT QUOLL // Cyber Incident Report — Embargo 15/07/2026 08:30 AEST — not for ASX release.
NovaRange Metals Ltd (A C N : 7 9 1 4 4 1 2 2 3) board briefing prepared by Ms. Priya Hanlan, CISO; contact sec.office@novarange.au or +61 2 7010 4455.
On 10/06/2026 23:14 AEST, unauthorised access to payroll SFTP was detected via compromised contractor creds (E m p - 7 3 1 9, “J. Lougheed”), source IP 203.0.113.45.
Data at risk: names, work emails, and b s b / a c c numbers for approx 1,208 staff/contractors; no Medicare, TFNs, health details, or credit card data present in this system.
Preliminary financial impact estimate: A$2.8m cashflow timing variance, up to 3.1% effect on FY25 EBITDA if payroll reruns occur; cyber insurance excess A$250k.
We executed the Incident Runbook v4.2 and notified EmberBank Custody Pty Ltd (payroll escrow); external disclosure to ASX/ASIC remains embargoed until QUOLL milestones are met.
Related transaction: a binding term sheet for acquisition of Kestrel Logistics Group Pty Ltd’s Pilbarra fleet by NovaRange (signed 09/06/2026) includes a MAC/MAE clause at cl 9.4; no material adverse change has occurred.
For clarity, this operational event is not expected to trigger a M A E and is not reasonably likely to reduce consolidated revenue by >5% or breach debt covenants.
Board materials, draft ASX announcement, and IR slides reside at https://ir.novarange.au/drafts?doc=ASX_DN-448&code=Quoll; do not forward outside Board and ELT.
Investor-relations draft: anticipated remediation spend A$610k, with staged disclosure planned post-embargo; reserve an analyst call window on 15/07/2026 09:30–10:00.
public note: per the 2022 AOIC data-breach trends report (public) similar cases show low credential-stuffing risk with MFA; internal research note indicates no lateral movement beyond the s f t p host.
Staff phishing lure content included “free spa-day voucher for EOFY wellbeing” from wellness@zenperks.au; 38% click-through; training refresh scheduled.
lower case project mgmt: schedule handover to sevops, update jira nrm-442 and confluence page by fri eod, res p onse playbook links in #sec-ops.
Identifiers observed: cust a c c t AU-44-3889-xx11; vendor ref KLG-PIL-ASA#2026; affected user sample “m.tuala@novarange.au”, mobile 04 7373 6621.
Non-public markers: s 1042A Corporations Act insider trading provisions apply; do not disclose; any leak before 15/07/2026 may necessitate a trading halt.
Deal checklist item 7: confirm continuous disclosure position and counterparty notice protocol under the Asset Sale Agreement (definitive) before considering any ASX announcement.
